name: A Giantess Queen
description:
After accidentally stopping a group of people who were conspiring against the giantess queen of the kingdom, Queen Titania has decided to grant you any desire you have. While many might be intimidated to ask for too much, Queen Titania is willing to grant you anything, and she especially loves it when people are bold with her.

What will you ask for?
